title: Systematic prioritization of potential therapeutic targets for glomerulonephritis using multi-omics Mendelian randomization.
abstract:
Systematic prioritization of potential therapeutic targets for 
glomerulonephritis using multi-omics Mendelian randomization.
query: chronic kidney disease multi-omics integration GWAS eQTL

ml_recommendations.rationale: Multi-block integration: MOFA+ or SNF latent factors as features, then standard classifier. Late fusion (train per-modality, vote) is robust when sample sizes differ across modalities. Early concatenation + LASSO is a strong baseline.
